name: WW Oriental Salad
recipeIngredient: thin strips of cooked roast beef, turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. In a salad bowl, combine the meat, rice, eggs, celery, green onions, and radish.
2. In a small bowl, combine teriyaki or soy sauce, sherry, oil, garlic powder, honey, dry mustard, and ginger. Stir until well mixed.
3. Pour the mixture over the meat and rice in the salad bowl.
4. Toss gently to coat everything evenly.
5. Serve on a bed of lettuce leaves.
